programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin

programme.title: Redeemed Forever Free
programme.desc: A documentary which tells the stories of five men, five very ordinary men, who have experienced a powerful life transformation. 5 broken men who have moved from a place of hopelessness to a place and life of purpose.

programme.title: Faith, Hope & Love
programme.desc: Recent divorcee Faith enters a dance contest to save her dance studio, where she meets Jimmy Hope and rediscovers her faith and dreams.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane

programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: The Wild Robot

programme.desc: In 1945 at the end of WWII, an atomic bomb hit Nagasaki. We enjoy the stunning scenery, but more importantly we talk with those who survived and remember those who lost their lives.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Japanology Plus explores Japanese life and culture. In this 5-minute digest, we look at tatami mats: a quintessentially Japanese flooring material.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BUDO Secrets
programme.desc: Karate, Taekwondo, Capoeira."Kicks"have evolved in different ways worldwide. Now, an Okinawan Karate master and a Muay Thai champion explore its cutting edge.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: Can typhoons be controlled? A national project explores solutions using ships and artificial clouds.

programme.title: An Evolving Font
programme.desc: Miyanaga Aiko (Contemporary artist) visits Kyoto. The Mincho font, drawn by hand in around 1990, evokes 350-year-old hand-carved woodblocks, made to print Buddhist sutras.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Samurai Castles
programme.desc: Okayama Castle is unique and puzzles visitors. The keep shows a different face, depending on the direction, and each floor is a different shape. We look at how this mysterious castle was built.

programme.title: My Street Piano
programme.desc: On a shopping street in front of Kagoshima Chuo Station sits Japan' s original street piano, which passersby love to visit and play from the heart.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Kamikaze
programme.desc: "Kamikaze," explosive-laden ramming attacks, were carried out during World War 2, sacrificing 4,000 lives. Why did the Japanese push forward with this method? We uncover the truth about the kamikaze.

programme.title: AMAMI
programme.desc: Amami Oshima is a World Natural Heritage Site, with rare flora and fauna including many endemic species. Explore the biodiversity of its lush, subtropical forests in stunning time-lapse footage.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Hiroshima's A-Bomb Survivor Trees
programme.desc: Trees that survived the A-bomb have inspired many in Hiroshima. 159 such trees are still alive, but some are nearing their end. We follow a tree surgeon and others who love and care for them.

programme.title: Hiroshima Theme Song
programme.desc: NHK Hiroshima's theme song by PORNOGRAFFITTI, marking 80 years since the city was atomic bombed. Full of wishes and prayers for peace, it depicts a streetcar that ran three days after the bombing.

programme.title: AMAMI
programme.desc: Amami Oshima is a World Natural Heritage Site, with rare flora and fauna including many endemic species. Explore the biodiversity of its lush, subtropical forests in stunning time-lapse footage.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: The prefecture of Nagasaki, historically Japan's gateway to the west, has a culture influenced by centuries of foreign trade. With over 1,400 islands, it also makes for a unique cycling experience.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Passy, an exclusive residential area in Paris, is home to a number of famous people. Known for its landmarks and museums, we visit Maison de Balzac, a piano restorer's workshop, and Bois de Boulogne.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Oze National Park contains the largest mountain wetland in Japan. See the beauty of Oze as time-lapse photography makes the flowers and the morning dew come alive.

programme.title: National Parks of Japan
programme.desc: Akan-Mashu National Park is home to Lake Akan, Lake Kussharo, and Lake Mashu. It provides unique winter sights and the opportunity to experience the indigenous Ainu culture.

programme.title: Ekiben Japan

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Japanese chef Kai Kosei's dishes feature "zako," fish either too small or not commonly eaten that are often discarded, causing a reevaluation of these once "useless" fish.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: The animals are playing hide and seek. Huffty gets upset when his trunk keeps giving him away. Can Raa Raa and his friends show the little elephant that his trunk is really rather wonderful?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa has got a new pogo stick. He is having a great time bouncing around, but his friends aren't so sure. Is there any way Raa Raa can practise without destroying their jungle home?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: All the animals are having a nap. But Raa Raa and Ooo Ooo aren't tired and want to play. Will they have enough energy to last until everyone else wakes up?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa is determined that he can copy all the noises in the Jingly Jangly Jungle, until he hears Topsy whistling. Try as he might, Raa Raa just can't whistle.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Cheeky Sheep
programme.desc: Pat has a special delivery for Amy: a brand new very special breed of sheep. But on the way to Amy's, the new sheep escapes and gets mixed up with all the other Greendale sheep.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Metal Detector
programme.desc: Beep beep beep! A metal detector has arrived for Ted and he'd like to use it to find his grandad's medal for Nisha's grand exhibition of local historical relics.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Crazy Crockery
programme.desc: Michael is organising 'Restaurant Night' at school and all the children have been busy cooking and baking special dishes for everyone to come and eat.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Runaway Bees
programme.desc: Dorothy is looking forward to a delivery from Pat: a hive of brand new honey bees. She's got the jars ready for the honey and everything, but keeping swarming bees in a hive is tricky business.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating "Sloth Day" in honor of its newest arrival Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, they are excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year's Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he's determined to stay up. But as the night goes on, Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang.

programme.title: The Mighty Ones
programme.desc: Bernard steals Rabbit's teeth and when Berry gets mistaken as an accomplice, they go on the run together. / Berry's head grows to monstrous size and keeps growing.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Bumble has been asked to Aunt Tulip's for tea but he is worried that his manners are not up to scratch. He asks the other tots to help him out.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Fifi is supposed to be babysitting Grubby, but she's forgotten! Stingo and Slugsy step in to cover for her, with disastrous results!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally 'steals' a pair of slippers from a store, he plans an elaborate 'heist' to return them and learns in the end that it's easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it's time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! Gabby and Pandy check in with the DJ Catnip then go to Mercat's Spa and order room service from Pillow Cat!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the ceremony.

programme.sub-title: When Life Gives You Bots/Bots of the Fall
programme.desc: Emma and Doug vow to help Emma's neighbor Thomas share his whole jug of lemonade by using creativity./Emma takes Doug and the bots to the Mega City Fall Festival.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby is framed for leaking info about the Stinkless Serum to PuppyCo and must flee on the run via Errand Day with the family.

programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting 'senior sitting'.

programme.desc: More epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po loses his title as Dragon Master after he comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake-causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: Fueled by adrenaline and gas station junk food, Ben and Darius arrive at Sammy's ranch only to run into another familiar face. What was supposed to be a reunion among friends quickly becomes a deadly game.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: Things get rocky when Ben, Sammy, and Darius reunite with Kenji in the mountains. Kenji struggles to accept the looming danger and see eye to eye with Darius.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Eager to come face-to-face with a real-life monster, Rocky and Bullwinkle buy a creepy, old mansion in hopes of finding a real monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: After Bullwinkle drinks a monster serum, he can't control when he turns into a big hairy monster, so he and Rocky go on the run from angry mobs and internet celebrities.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle and Rocky fly to a mysterious monster-inhabited island to meet the missing mad scientist that created the serum that turned Bullwinkle into a monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.desc: A young mother trapped in slavery seizes the opportunity to escape with her family when Harriet Tubman leads the young family through the Underground Railroad.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Ambushed by the Ambassador of Ignorance
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: When the comic book craze sweeps Hope Valley, Elizabeth teaches her students through nature. Rosemary launches a radio show, and Lucas meets a new political player.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 1
programme.desc: Do you ever get tired of what you're doing? Today on the program, Joyce discusses why it's so important to do the right thing, with a right attitude that honours God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Man of God
programme.desc: Exiled unjustly, convicted without trial, slandered without cause. Man of God depicts the trials and tribulations of Saint Nektarios of Aegina, as he bears the unjust hatred of his enemies while preaching the Word of God.

programme.title: The Other Side of the River
programme.desc: As a young girl living in the Amazonian jungle, Elba wondered if there wasn't a better life on the other side of the river.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: With war raging and soldiers closing in, wounded missionary Gladys Aylward sets out on the most difficult journey of her life - a 100-mile trek over mountains with 100 orphaned children to find a safe haven.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the New Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Living as Impacters in the Modern World Part 1
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Love & Glamping
programme.desc: City girl Katie is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort. Far from sporty, she faces her fears trying the camp's activities with help from Will, a rugged outdoorsman and nature guide.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: The first big case leaves Gary grasping for clues. He goes on a covert hunt with an old friend at his side.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: This is Bigger Than We Know
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt1
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 1
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 1
programme.desc: Do you ever get tired of what you're doing? Today on the program, Joyce discusses why it's so important to do the right thing, with a right attitude that honours God.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level

programme.title: Biz Stream Special Edition

programme.title: Magical Japanese

programme.title: Culture Crossroads

programme.title: Hometown Stories

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period. This episode features ukiyo-e artist Sharaku's "The Actor Ichikawa Ebizo as Takemura Sadanoshin."

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: Inami Shishimai is a type of lion dance performed in Toyama Prefecture. Adults play the role of the shishi while a child is the shishi-tori, whose job is to pacify the shishi with sacred objects.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Cute, round-eyed Sengis live in the African savannah. They build complex trails where they raise their young. When threatened, they take off at full speed. This episode looks at their amazing lives.

programme.title: Red Joan

programme.title: Travis: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On April 10, 2012, life for the Mills family dramatically changed forever. A routine patrol in Afghanistan turned into the fight of SSG Travis Mills's life when he was hit by an IED and lost portions of both arms and legs.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real and relatable. Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 1
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Three Prayers of Forgiveness, Pastor Bayless unpacks the prayer of Paul from 2 Timothy: "May it not be counted against them."

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: It's my great joy to introduce to you my amazing daughter Emily Ruonala as she shares an amazing message around Psalms.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 2
programme.desc: Find out how to reignite your passion and transform your life as Joyce shares powerful insights on the importance of stirring yourself up, as well as those around you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Before You Step Out of the Will of God/The Troublemaker Within Us
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues,Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Love & Glamping
programme.desc: City girl Katie is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort. Far from sporty, she faces her fears trying the camp's activities with help from Will, a rugged outdoorsman and nature guide.

programme.title: The Journey - 20 years of Red Frogs
programme.desc: Armed with over 10 tonne of Allen's lollies, Red Frogs volunteers assist school-leavers by walking them home, cooking pancakes and offering emotional support. 20 years since that first schoolies week, we look at the Red Frogs journey.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: What's Your Everest?
programme.desc: An inspiring expedition documentary following Bjorn Brickell of Life FM, Sue Van Schreven of Orphans Aid International and a team of supporters, as they climb to one of the worlds most renowned trekking destinations.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Khirbet Qeiyafa - Witness to David's Kingdom
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: King Herod _ A Legacy of Blood and Stone
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 2
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A group of California Christians present the claims of Christ to unbelievers at Huntington Beach.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 2
programme.desc: Find out how to reignite your passion and transform your life as Joyce shares powerful insights on the importance of stirring yourself up, as well as those around you.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: Norm Geisler: Not Qualified
programme.desc: An illiterate farm boy asks why Christianity is true, and no one seems to have the answers. His journey to finding those answers leads him to become a worldwide leader who affects the Christian faith in a mighty way.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period. This episode features ukiyo-e artist Sharaku's "The Actor Ichikawa Ebizo as Takemura Sadanoshin."

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: My Street Piano
programme.desc: Shibuya is one of Tokyo's largest cities. A piano is placed near a ticket gate at the station, and people stop to play from their heart.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to the color red. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Actor Fujiwara Momona has been a wheelchair user since childhood. In a society that tends to limit how people with disabilities live their lives, what world does this budding actor hope to build?

programme.title: 1/30: People With Mental Illness
programme.desc: 1 in 30 Japanese suffer from mental illness. We follow a woman who finds it hard to do simple tasks due to her illness, as she goes to rehabilitation for returning to work.

programme.title: A Final Lesson

programme.desc: NHK Hiroshima's theme song by PORNOGRAFFITTI, marking 80 years since the city was atomic bombed. Full of wishes and prayers for peace, it depicts a streetcar that ran three days after the bombing.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This program visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: Passing the Torch of Peace

programme.title: Norm Geisler: Not Qualified
programme.desc: An illiterate farm boy asks why Christianity is true, and no one seems to have the answers. His journey to finding those answers leads him to become a worldwide leader who affects the Christian faith in a mighty way.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Before You Step Out of the Will of God/The Troublemaker Within Us
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues,Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Becca is always a bridesmaid, but at her cousin's wedding she bonds with Kyle, the videographer covering every stage of the planning. Perhaps she won't be the last woman standing for long.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 2
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches on "Humanity". He explains how we should trust and have faith in God who won't fail, rather than trusting and having faith in humanity which will fail.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: As a business succeeds and grows, building teams becomes an integral part of achieving business goals.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels get cheesy with a very dairy loaded episode.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: A Book That Will Change Your Life
programme.desc: During this special Turning Point event, filmed at Madison Square Garden in New York City, discover how the Bible will change your life.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with worry or anxiety? Today, Joyce discusses how God's peace is the key to overcoming anxiety. Trust God and watch how He transforms your circumstances.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.sub-title: The Gospel Spreads to the Gentiles
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts, he travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: For? His time, Jesus was radically inclusive of both men & women. On the whole, the Church has been racially diverse, and often a place where women have experienced greater freedom than in society.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: It's my great joy to introduce to you my amazing daughter Emily Ruonala as she shares an amazing message around Psalms.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Daniel Flynn is co-founder and managing director of Thankyou, a brand which saw success and notoriety. But as public success grew, Daniel's fear of failure became something he couldn't ignore.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: When the comic book craze sweeps Hope Valley, Elizabeth teaches her students through nature. Rosemary launches a radio show, and Lucas meets a new political player.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: After spending a night sleeping it rough in Melbourne, the ladies come together with The National Homeless Collective & an inspiring woman to give a young lady who escaped homelessness a fabulous makeover!

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: Walking in the Footsteps of Faith
programme.desc: Discover how giants of the faith like Mother Theresa, Martin Luther, and David Livingston lived following Steve walking in their footsteps!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Will Faith Do Us Part?

programme.title: Puss in Boots

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law and other seniors as a way to make quick cash.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon

programme.title: Matilda

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.desc: Kumamoto is recovering from the 2016 earthquake. A piano is placed in a shopping arcade for a limited period, and people stop to play from their heart.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: In a Japanese home cooking class, Chef Saito makes pan-fried eggplant with a savory miso and sesame glaze. Paired with fine white somen noodles, this tasty summer dish is sure to whet your appetite!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Biz Stream Special Edition
programme.desc: This episode features business models designed to help Japan's hikikomori (individuals who have withdrawn from society) to socialize, learn, and even find employment.

programme.title: 1/10: Married By Matching Apps
programme.desc: 1 in 10 Japanese got married through online spouse-hunting services in 2020. We interview women who use matchmaking apps, including Manami, who uses multiple apps to find a perfect partner.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Muta Yoca is an artist whose vibrant, dynamic pieces are based on the Kutani-yaki style of ceramics. We speak with Muta about her global popularity and how she creates art unburdened by convention.

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: Gataine Odori is a dance that depicts exhausting land reclamation work carried out in Omuta in the 19th century. A group of elderly women teach the dance to schoolchildren, and keep the story alive.

programme.title: The Three Crows of Nagasaki
programme.desc: Keiho Junior High School in Nagasaki lost 400 lives to an atomic bomb. Three old core members of the alumni association explore the future of the memorial service, held annually for the past 50 years.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: Locals have slurped down bowls of noodles at a 24-hour ramen restaurant in Fukuoka for five decades. For three days, we asked customers why this simple ramen is more than just a cheap meal.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, performers dress as monsters called namahage. It's a good-natured tradition that strengthens family and community bonds. And in the village of Tayazawa, it was recently revived.

programme.title: Passing the Torch of Peace
programme.desc: The key to achieving peace is feeling the pain of others. It's an idea Hayashida Mitsuhiro picked up from hibakusha in his native Nagasaki, and one he tries to teach young visitors to his city.

programme.title: Science View
programme.desc: Tiny nematodes can survive in harsh environments, regenerate damaged tissue, and make decisions. They're being studied for hints about new medicines. We'll also look at recycled concrete.

programme.desc: The animals are all looking forward to waking up early to watch the dawn chorus, but Huffty doesn't stir when the alarm goes off. Can Raa Raa and the others wake the sleeping elephant in time?

programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Karaoke Night

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat's delivering two things: Dottie the hamster, and a didgeridoo from Australia, both to the school. But Dottie goes missing and everyone is searching high and low for her.

programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Amazing Weather Machine

programme.desc: Ajay's organised a big Skateboard Sizzle competition for everyone to show off their skateboard moves. There's a wonderful course set up with ramps and everything.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job.

programme.sub-title: The Sleepover Save / The Very Hungry Vacuum

programme.desc: When Eep wants alone time with her new friend Dawn, Guy seeks a new friend of his own and finds an unlikely companion in Thunk.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of trading up valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition, a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous

programme.title: Will Faith Do Us Part?
programme.desc: Will Faith Do Us Part? reveals the intimate stories of three Christian couples who are dealing with the challenges of being united with a spouse who is no less devoted to Jesus, yet has different beliefs and faith practices from their own.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches on "Humanity". He explains how we should trust and have faith in God who won't fail, rather than trusting and having faith in humanity which will fail.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Three Prayers of Forgiveness, Pastor Bayless unpacks the prayer of Paul from 2 Timothy: "May it not be counted against them."

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Living as Impacters in the Modern World Part 1
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: The Israelites are trying to get to the promised land, but first they must pass through Jericho, which is guarded by the French Peas! Will Joshua listen to God's directions, or will he try to do things his way?

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt1
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Connection is a living, breathing entity, and is the cornerstone of a healthy relationship. Hear first hand how a break down in a marriage can occur and the steps that can be taken to reach reconciliation.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever found yourself wondering why your prayers aren't answered? If so, you're not alone. Today, Joyce shares some of the reasons why prayer isn't answered.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: When the comic book craze sweeps Hope Valley, Elizabeth teaches her students through nature. Rosemary launches a radio show, and Lucas meets a new political player.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: After spending a night sleeping it rough in Melbourne, the ladies come together with The National Homeless Collective & an inspiring woman to give a young lady who escaped homelessness a fabulous makeover!

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Twelve deeply practical and intensely personal, powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, AROUND THE WORLD gets little ones singing and praising God!

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Join in the incredible adventures of Christopher and Joy. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend, Gizmo.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Charles Babbage - The TRUE Father of Modern Computing
programme.desc: Charles Babbage's brilliant mind was way ahead of its time. Babbage invented a fully functional mechanical calculator that became the foundation of the modern-day computer.

programme.title: TV4DADs
programme.desc: In Season 6 of the program, Brian teams up with his daughter Jeni (from Jeni:Seeking the Extraordinary) for an adventure in Florida that sees them catching fish, throwing axes, and being ambushed by killer birds.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Our foodie friends go diving into dumplings while Allie gets a unique sunset sail on the river.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals & abbeys found throughout England & Wales, featuring interviews with historians & experts & breathtaking footage.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Wholly American and yet uniquely apart, Puerto Ricans discuss their "American" identity.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Has Made The Finish Line Your Starting Post Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: It's my great joy to introduce to you my amazing daughter Emily Ruonala as she shares an amazing message around Psalms.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever found yourself wondering why your prayers aren't answered? If so, you're not alone. Today, Joyce shares some of the reasons why prayer isn't answered.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she books a spontaneous ski getaway with her best friend.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into NYC's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young yeti on the roof of her apartment building, she and her friends embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.
